## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11 + WSL2, macOS, Linux)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120)
- **Docker version:** (e.g., 24.0.7)
- **SikaGit version:** (e.g., latest master)
